title: Patient Selection (Terminal)
description: Patient selection surface within the browser terminal. Transitions the terminal session into a patient context. Patient lookup RPCs are well-established CPRS patterns. Specific terminal-mode patient selection menus require VistA menu-option research. This contract governs the platform surface and access posture only; inside-terminal VistA authorization (menu options, security keys) is not restated here.

phiGovernance.justification: Patient selection requires accessing patient identifiers (name, DFN, SSN last-4) to locate the correct patient record.
